changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'sputum'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'sputum'

changeSet.comment: Link Sputum sample type to TB Laboratory department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 1, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'sputum';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'bal'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'bal'

changeSet.comment: Link BAL sample type to TB Laboratory department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 2, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'bal';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'pleural fluid'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'pleural fluid'

changeSet.comment: Link Pleural Fluid sample type to TB Laboratory department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 3, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'pleural fluid';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'csf'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'csf'

changeSet.comment: Link CSF sample type to TB Laboratory department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 4, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'csf';

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'tissue'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'tissue'

changeSet.comment: Link Tissue sample type to TB Laboratory department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 5, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'tissue';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'gastric aspirate'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.department_sample_type dst JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON dst.test_section_id = ts.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON dst.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE ts.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'gastric aspirate'

changeSet.comment: Link Gastric Aspirate sample type to TB Laboratory department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.department_sample_type (id, test_section_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.department_sample_type_seq'), ts.id, tos.id, 'Y', 6, now() FROM clinlims.test_section ts, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE ts.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'gastric aspirate';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'

changeSet.comment: Remove organization-based TB sample type links (replaced by department-based links)
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.organization_sample_type WHERE org_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory');

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'

changeSet.comment: Remove TB notebook-organization link (replaced by notebook-department link)
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.notebook_organizations WHERE organization_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory');
